texto: My Cape women are generally true to type - big hearted, motherly women who love the sea. My other characters, with the exception of the Portuguese, who I occasionally mention as Cape dwellers, are obviously drawn from the city types one sees in everyday life.
explicacao: Citação de Joseph C. Lincoln sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “My Cape women are generally true to type - big hearted, motherly women who love the sea. My other…” articula amor, love, vida em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como vida e sea.

frase_original: My Cape women are generally true to type - big hearted, motherly women who love the sea. My other characters, with the exception of the Portuguese, who I occasionally mention as Cape dwellers, are obviously drawn from the city types one sees in everyday life.
